title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Mastech Holdings - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Mastech Holdings - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Mastech Holdings, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mastech Holdings:
Mastech Holdings is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mastech Holdings!
